zh.Marston, Derby, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾馬爾斯頓
zh.Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x是Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham和Helena of Kent的兒子，出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾。他與Mary de St Martin在蘇格蘭雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1234年之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x是Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham和Helena of Kent的儿子，出生在苏格兰雷福福爾。他与Mary de St Martin在苏格兰雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1234年之前在他的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x was born in Renfrewshire, Scotland as the son of Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham and Helena of Kent. He married Mary de St Martin in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 1234, in his hometown, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x est né à Renfrewshire, Écosse, fils de Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham et Helena of Kent. Il a épousé Mary de St Martin à Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 1234, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x wurde in Renfrewshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham und Helena of Kent geboren. Er hat in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland Mary de St Martin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 1234 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x è nato il nel Renfrewshire, Scotland come figlio di Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham e Helena of Kent. Lui sposato Mary de St Martin nel Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 1234, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery xはスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアでSir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of EagleshamとHelena of Kentの息子として生まれた。スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエアグレシャムでMary de St Martinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1234年以前に故郷で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x(은)는 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham(와)과 Helena of Kent의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 이글레샤에서 Mary de St Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1234년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Marston, Derby, England: Marston, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x nasceu em Renfrewshire, Scotland filho de Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham e Helena of Kent. Ele casou-se com Mary de St Martin em Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1234, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x родился в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham и Helena of Kent. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de St Martin в местности эаглешам, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 1234 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Montgomery x nació en Renfrewshire, Scotland como hijo de Sir John Montgomerie 6th Earl of Eaglesham y Helena of Kent. Se casó con Mary de St Martin en Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 1234, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
